title: Meet Scheduler Agent
name: Cali
description: Manages your calendar, schedules meetings, and talks on your behalf
benefits: Save hours every week on back-and-forth scheduling
Never miss a meeting request buried in your inbox
Eliminate time zone confusion across global teams
features: Detects scheduling intent from emails and Slack messages
Checks your calendar for real-time availability
Handles time zone conversions automatically
Sends meeting invites and confirmations on your behalf
Reschedules and resolves conflicts without manual input

title: Inbox Cleaner Agent
name: Tidy
description: Filters and organizes your incoming messages to keep your inbox clutter-free
benefits: Reclaim focus by removing inbox noise instantly
Never miss an important message buried under newsletters
Keep your inbox organized without lifting a finger
features: Applies custom Gmail filtering rules automatically
Filters and categorizes Slack messages by priority
Organizes emails into smart inbox categories
Learns your priorities and adapts over time
Surfaces urgent messages that need immediate attention

title: Auto Followup Agent
name: Chaser
description: Tracks unanswered threads and sends timely follow-ups on your behalf
benefits: Close deals faster by never letting a thread go cold
Maintain relationships without manual tracking
Reduce dropped conversations by up to 90%
features: Monitors sent messages for unanswered threads
Sends polite follow-ups at configurable intervals
Writes in your tone and communication style
Escalates stale threads when needed
Respects do-not-follow-up rules and quiet hours

title: Drafting Agent
name: Donna
description: Drafts emails, messages, tickets, calendar events and more in your tone
benefits: Reply to emails in seconds instead of minutes
Maintain a consistent voice across all communications
Free up mental energy for high-value work
features: Auto-drafts emails and messages using your writing style
Creates calendar event descriptions automatically
Adapts tone based on recipient and context
Uses your saved templates for recurring messages
Handles replies, forwards, and new compositions

title: Support Agent
name: Remy
description: Handles support requests and resolves issues on your behalf
benefits: Respond to support tickets instantly, 24/7
Reduce resolution time by surfacing relevant solutions
Scale your support without growing headcount
features: Responds to incoming support tickets and messages
Diagnoses issues from user descriptions
Finds solutions from your knowledge base and docs
Escalates complex issues to the right team member
Tracks resolution progress and follows up

title: Daily Reports Agent
name: Briefs
description: Generates and delivers recurring reports from your data and conversations
benefits: Start every day with a clear picture of what matters
Stop wasting time manually compiling updates
Catch trends and issues before they escalate
features: Generates daily and weekly summary reports
Pulls data from emails, messages, and integrations
Highlights key changes and action items
Tracks metrics and trends over time
Delivers reports on your preferred schedule

title: Data Extraction Agent
name: Sherlock
description: Extracts and structures information from documents, emails, and attachments
benefits: Eliminate manual data entry from documents and emails
Get structured data from unstructured sources instantly
Feed clean data directly into your workflows
features: Extracts key fields from PDFs, invoices, and documents
Parses email content and attachments automatically
Structures data into tables, records, and spreadsheets
Identifies entities, dates, and amounts
Exports to your preferred format and destination

title: Relationship Manager Agent
name: Ally
description: Finds mutual connections and helps you reach the right people
benefits: Unlock warm introductions through your existing network
Never forget to follow up with key contacts
Build stronger professional relationships effortlessly
features: Maps your professional network across platforms
Identifies mutual connections for warm intros
Suggests the best path to reach any contact
Tracks relationship history and touchpoints
Reminds you to stay in touch with key people
